pattern: Every minute after the first adds one more diamond-shaped ring of cells around the growing blob, and each new ring is exactly four times larger than the previous one's radius, so a running sum of ring sizes gives the total.
hints: After the first minute there is exactly one colored cell; every following minute adds a full ring around everything colored so far.
The ring added at minute k (for k from 2 up to n) contains exactly 4*(k-1) new cells, because it wraps a diamond shape whose perimeter grows linearly.
Summing 1 plus 4*(k-1) for k from 2 to n gives a closed form: the total is 2*n*n - 2*n + 1.

edge_inputs.description: value where a naive loop off-by-one would undercount or overcount by one ring
another mid-range value for cross-checking the closed form

stress.description: every value across the legal range, biased toward the extremes
